## Summary

<!-- What does this change, and why? -->

## Verification loop

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run format` applied (or the format-on-edit hook ran)

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commits message(s)
- [ ] README file-tree updated if I added / moved / removed a file
- [ ] Chose the **least-powerful** layer (advice → permissions → hook → skill → subagent)
- [ ] No secrets in committed files; `.env*` and other protected paths untouched
- [ ] Any DB change is a **new** `migrations/` file (existing migrations unchanged)

## Notes
